/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Blocks2d.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/Blocks2d.dir/src/Blocks2d.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Blocks2d.dir/src/camera/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Blocks2d.dir/src/math/random/Random.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Blocks2d.dir/src/player/Player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Blocks2d.dir/src/terrain/World.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Blocks2d.dir/src/terrain/chunk/Chunk.cpp.o -o Blocks2d  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-graphics.so.2.6.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-window.so.2.6.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-system.so.2.6.2
